title: HMRC annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025
body: "  HMRC annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025 – reader survey  Please take a few minutes to provide us with some feedback on the HMRC Annual Report and Accounts 2024 to 2025, by completing this short form   HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC) deals with the tax and payments affairs of virtually every business and individual in the UK.  This report sets out how we have performed for the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  Further publications and supporting technical notes  HMRC’s annual report and accounts technical notes:    HMRC compliance yield: technical note Large business compliance: technical note Wealthy individuals and mid-sized business compliance: technical note Fraud Investigation Service: technical note Tax by different customer groups — 2024 to 2025   "
